Metadata.title: Calma | Sleep Sounds, Relaxation and Focus App
Metadata.description: Calma is a beautifully simple sleep sounds and relaxation app that helps you create personalized audio mixes for better sleep, calmer evenings and deeper focus.
Metadata.keywords: sleep sounds app, relaxation app, focus sounds app, sound mixer app, sleep sounds, relaxing sounds, focus sounds, white noise app, calma app, ADHD focus sounds, anxiety relief sounds, calma sleep sounds

Footer.tagline: A beautifully simple app for sleep, relaxation, focus and personalized soundscapes.
